description_long: This is a round, rustic loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust and a slightly domed top. The surface features deep, irregular scoring marks and a few lighter patches, suggesting a traditional artisan baking method. The crust appears blistered and uneven, with some darker, almost charred spots, especially on the upper ridges. The loaf has a dense, compact form, and the bottom edge shows a slight overbake with a darker ring. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or branding on the exterior. The bread looks hearty and substantial, typical of a sourdough or country-style boule.
description: A round, rustic loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown, blistered crust and deep scoring marks. The surface is uneven and artisanal, with no visible branding or packaging.
description_view_0: This view highlights the loaf's domed top and deep, dark scoring marks, with a pronounced golden-brown crust and some charred spots.
description_view_1: The loaf appears slightly flatter from this angle, showing more of the bottom edge and a lighter crust with visible scoring and a darker ring at the base.
description_view_2: This side reveals a smoother, lighter crust with less pronounced scoring and a more uniform golden color, with a few small blisters.
description_view_3: The back view displays the most even and pale section of the crust, with subtle scoring lines and minimal charring.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features deep, irregular scoring marks and a blistered, rustic texture with some darker, charred spots. There is no visible flour dusting or seeds, giving it a traditional artisan appearance.
